summary: #90982 remains the live canonical issue. #91002 is the best repairable contributor PR for the root cause, but it is not merge-ready from the hydrated artifact: mergeability is unknown, two checks are failing, ClawSweeper still calls out missing Gateway/protocol abort-path coverage, and there is no clean Codex /review merge preflight. Plan branch repair on #91002 instead of closing or merging now.

actions.reason: Keep the canonical issue open until the repairable fix path in #91002 is validated and merged.
